# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues with exploit details.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting for this repository. If that is not available, open a minimal public issue asking for a security contact and leave out reproduction details until a maintainer responds.

Include the affected version or commit, impact, reproduction steps, and any known mitigations.

## Supported Versions

Security fixes target the latest released version unless maintainers state otherwise.

## Disclosure

Maintainers will confirm receipt, assess severity, and coordinate a fix before public disclosure.
